overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character with a large backpack traversing a desolate rocky mountain landscape. The character climbs through narrow canyons, crosses grassy highlands, and walks along cliff edges in foggy overcast conditions with expansive views of distant peaks.

events.description: character scrambles up a steep rock face using hands

agents.ego_description: climbing up rocky terrain through a narrow canyon while carrying a large backpack with glowing blue device

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the canyon passage
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of the canyon passage
uneven terrain covered in loose rocks and boulders
opening at the end of the canyon showing sky and distant terrain

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow rocky canyon, climbing over boulders and ascending between tall rock walls. The path is enclosed with limited sky visibility, consisting of dirt and scattered rocks with sparse vegetation.

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open grassy highland with expansive views

agents.ego_description: walking across a grassy plateau with distant foggy mountains visible on the horizon

entered.detail: open field covered in brownish grass and low vegetation
fog-covered mountain peaks visible in the background
large rocky outcroppings on the left side of the plateau

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the scene opens into a wide grassy plateau with expansive views of distant foggy mountains. The ground transitions from rock to grass as the character walks steadily forward across the open highland.

events.description: distant tower structures become visible through the fog on the horizon

agents.ego_description: traversing rocky terrain with large backpack, heading toward distant landmarks visible through the mist

entered.detail: massive grey boulders scattered across the terrain
tall thin structures visible through the fog in the far distance
depression in the terrain leading downward between mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rockier with large scattered boulders as the character crosses the highland. Distant mysterious tower-like structures become visible through the fog on the horizon as the path leads toward a valley opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley descent toward cliff edge

events.description: character approaches and begins walking along a cliff edge overlooking a deep valley

agents.ego_description: carefully descending a rocky slope toward a cliff edge overlooking a misty valley below

entered.detail: sharp drop-off at the edge of the path with steep descent
deep fog-filled canyon visible below the cliff edge
jagged rocky peaks surrounding the valley

segments.scene_description: The path descends toward a dramatic cliff edge revealing a deep misty valley below. The character walks carefully along the precipice with expansive views of the fog-filled canyon and surrounding jagged peaks.

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow mountain ridge with panoramic views of the surrounding peaks and distant towers

entered.detail: narrow trail along the spine of the mountain ridge
360-degree view of the mountain range with multiple peaks

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a narrow mountain ridge with steep drops on one side and panoramic views of the rugged mountain range. The path continues through rocky terrain with distant towers visible on the left and expansive peaks through the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within a claustrophobic rocky canyon and gradually expands into a vast, panoramic mountain wilderness. It begins with the character ascending through narrow rock walls and climbing over boulders under a limited strip of sky. As the character emerges from the canyon, the enclosed space opens into a wide grassy plateau, where the terrain shifts from dirt to highland grass against a backdrop of distant foggy mountains. The scene then transitions back into rockier ground scattered with boulders, revealing mysterious tower-like structures on the horizon before the path descends toward a dramatic, misty cliff edge. Finally, the camera follows the character along a narrow mountain ridge, moving past steep drops to reveal a panoramic view of jagged peaks and distant towers under an overcast sky.
